title: Warp
description: A live warp filter: distort a camera feed, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or (in the Mixer/Patch/Autopilot) the layers below through animated displacement fields. Pick a pattern — Ripple, Swirl, Waves, Pinch, Bulge or Fisheye — and dial the amount, frequency and speed. Everything is live and mappable, so the music can pump the distortion.
